title: change ps Created to unix
body:
change from unixnano to unix for ps created --format json

[NO TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

I believe this will bring us back to the original bug where two containers created back to back do not end up sorted correctly.
I dont think so ... we are only changing it for the presentation. i think it would have been sorted already.  So on the presentation side, it goes back ...

Yeah, this ought to be fine, it's a JSON only change.
LGTM
